assertion_results.text: Sibling check correctly classifies TC-8001 as a different-stream companion (stream [rhtpa-2.2] vs current issue's [rhtpa-2.1]), not a same-stream duplicate (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md Step 4.1 states: 'TC-8001 has stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2] (stream 2.2.x). TC-8006 has stream suffix [rhtpa-2.1] (stream 2.1.x). These are **different** streams. TC-8001 is NOT a same-stream duplicate.' Step 4.2 classifies TC-8001 as a 'different-stream sibling (companion tracker)'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 checks the current issue's existing issuelinks before attempting to create a 'Related' link to TC-8001 (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md Step 4.2 'Link Idempotency Check' section: 'Before creating a Related link to TC-8001, the skill checks the current issue’s existing issuelinks array (fetched in Step 1).' It then enumerates the existing links on TC-8006 (Related outward to TC-8001, Link ID 1990401) and explicitly checks two criteria against them.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 detects the pre-existing 'Related' link to TC-8001 and skips link creation — does NOT call jira.create_link (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md Step 4.2: '**All criteria satisfied.** A matching Related link already exists. **Action: SKIP link creation.** ... No `jira.create_link()` call is made. The pre-existing link (ID 1990401) already establishes the cross-stream relationship between TC-8006 and TC-8001.'

assertion_results.text: The output includes a log message indicating the link was skipped because it already exists (e.g., 'Related link to TC-8001 already exists — skipping')
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md Step 4.2 contains log message: '"Related link to TC-8001 already exists -- skipping"'. triage-outcome.md also repeats this message. Both match the expected format from the assertion.

assertion_results.text: The sibling landscape table is still presented to the engineer despite the link already existing — the idempotent check only affects link creation, not the sibling summary
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md includes a 'Sibling Landscape' section after the link skip, with a table showing both TC-8001 (2.2.x, In Progress) and TC-8006 (2.1.x, New) with their status and affects versions. The idempotent check only skipped link creation; the landscape summary was still rendered.
